aspectran.description: | |{{CYAN}}Try running these example commands:{{reset}} | {{bold}}hello{{bold:off}} - Prints "Hello, World!" in your console | {{bold}}hello2{{bold:off}} - Prints "Hello, World!" using ANSI color codes | {{bold}}echo1{{bold:off}} - Accepts parameters and prints them back | --- To see more examples, type '{{GREEN}}translet -l{{reset}}' --- | |{{CYAN}}Control and Access Servers:{{reset}} | Use '{{GREEN}}undertow{{reset}}' to manage the built-in Undertow Server. | Open {{81}}http://localhost:8080/{{reset}} in your browser. | | Use '{{GREEN}}jetty{{reset}}' to manage the built-in Jetty Server. | Open {{81}}http://localhost:8081/{{reset}} in your browser. |
| |The {{MAGENTA}}"Aspectran Demo"{{reset}} is a reference application built to |demonstrate best practices for developing Aspectran applications. |
